title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their organizations are adopting AI coding tools at scale. They cover workflow changes, productivity measurement, and lessons learned from real-world deployment across the software development lifecycle.
